Table DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER

Card of table DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER

Name

DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER

Code

DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER

---------------------- Pseudocode ----------------------------------

 

 

 

 

1. Initialize a new table in the Presentation Layer in "DB_CONS_PL_(env)" under "PL_PROGRAM" schema

called "DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER".

 

2. Define the Columns, based on the script provided.

 

3. Define the Constraints

Primary Key (Unique Record Identifier):

DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER_KEY = MD5(Concatenation of (DCSID, INVITATIONCODE, MARKET_CODE))

 

 

 

4. Save the table definition.

 

5. Maintain Data Dictionary

i. Add the column description to each column (from Comment tab in PD).

ii. Mention the Data Classification & PII category for each column and mask them as per standard guideline.

 

6. The data in the target object must stay deduplicated.

 

7. Follow the Entity & Attribute level Business Rules defined.

 

8. Run the RLS specific script based on the MARKET_CODE (applicable for QAS & Prod).

 

 

 

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------- Load Type -----------------------------------------------------------------

SCD1

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

 


Check constraint name of the table DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER

CKT_DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATH


Server validation rule of the table DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER

%RULES%


Code preview of the table DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER

drop table DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER
--==============================================================
create or replace table PL_PROGRAM.DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER (
DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER_KEY TEXT not null,
DCS_USER_KEY TEXT not null,
DCS_DCS_USER_KEY TEXT not null,
DCSID INTEGER not null,
EMAIL TEXT,
FIRSTNAME TEXT,
LASTNAME TEXT,
CAMPAIGN TEXT,
INVITATIONCODE TEXT not null,
MARKET_CODE TEXT not null,
constraint PK_DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHE primary key (DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER_KEY)
not enforced
);

comment on column PL_PROGRAM.DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER.DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_PROGRAM.DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER.DCS_USER_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_PROGRAM.DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER.DCS_DCS_USER_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_PROGRAM.DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER.DCSID is
'Sequencial number user identifier for communication with ACS.  ';

comment on column PL_PROGRAM.DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER.EMAIL is
'User email address';

comment on column PL_PROGRAM.DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER.FIRSTNAME is
'First name';

comment on column PL_PROGRAM.DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER.LASTNAME is
'Last name';

comment on column PL_PROGRAM.DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER.CAMPAIGN is
'The loyalty campaign name';

comment on column PL_PROGRAM.DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER.INVITATIONCODE is
'This is the exposed code for the Invitation. ';

comment on column PL_PROGRAM.DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER.MARKET_CODE is
'Identifier for the Market -> 2 letter Country Code + ''04''';

alter table PL_PROGRAM.DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER
add constraint FK_DCS_REFE_R36_USER__DCS_USER foreign key (DCS_USER_KEY)
references PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER (DCS_USER_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_PROGRAM.DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER
add constraint FK_DCS_REFE_R41_USER__DCS_USER foreign key (DCS_DCS_USER_KEY)
references PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER (DCS_USER_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;
